llm_themes.description: Remote and hybrid workers frustrated with makeshift workspaces, craving physical separation between work and personal life.

supporting_quotes.quote: I'm currently working from the dining table and it's not ideal.
Working from the guest bedroom means I'm never really off.
I need better work-life separation — my desk is in the living room.

llm_themes.description: Active lifestyle enthusiasts whose equipment has taken over garages, closets, and living spaces, seeking dedicated storage and workshop space.

supporting_quotes.quote: My garage is packed and I can't fit my car in there anymore.
I need gear storage and an editing station for outdoor photography.

llm_themes.description: Health-conscious individuals seeking a personal retreat space for yoga, meditation, and creative practices away from household interruptions.

supporting_quotes.quote: I dream of a proper wellness space separate from the house.
I crave a personal sanctuary at home for decompression after long shifts.

llm_themes.description: Property-minded homeowners who view backyard structures as value-add investments, comparing favorably to expensive ADU alternatives.

supporting_quotes.quote: I follow property values closely — every improvement should add value.
I want an impressive, private meeting space that also adds to property value.

llm_themes.description: Cost-conscious families needing multipurpose space for kids, hobbies, and storage, where $23K is a significant but potentially worthwhile investment.

supporting_quotes.quote: We have too much stuff and not enough space.
I need somewhere to practice guitar without bothering neighbors.

segment_suggestions.description: Professionals working from home full-time or hybrid who lack dedicated workspace and suffer from blurred work-life boundaries.
segment_suggestions.key_driver: Physical separation of work and home

segment_suggestions.description: Outdoor enthusiasts drowning in gear who want workshop/storage space integrated into their active lifestyle.
Health-focused individuals seeking a personal sanctuary for yoga, meditation, and creative practice.
Investment-oriented homeowners who see backyard structures as affordable alternatives to ADUs with strong ROI potential.
Cost-sensitive households needing multipurpose space for kids, hobbies, and storage. Financing is the key enabler.
segment_suggestions.key_driver: Affordable additional space for family needs
